title: Commonplace: Self-hosted, privacy-tiered memory for your AI agents
abstract: Imagine Commonplace as a personalized smart personal assistant tailored just for you and your AI agents. Think of it like having a private, self-hosted notebook with built-in privacy that keeps track of all important conversations and thoughts. It's the little gadget that helps manage your AI's memory—making work easier and more enjoyable. Give it a try! 🎉
abstract_zh: Commonplace就像一个私人订制的智能小秘书，专为你和你的AI伙伴打造。想象一下，你有了一本可以自托管、还自带隐私保护的笔记本，里面记录着所有重要的对话与思考。Commonplace就是那个能帮你管理AI记忆的小神器！赶紧来试试吧，让工作变得轻松又有趣！🎉
